attributes.description: Alerts when more than 1 leader change occurs in 15 minutes (`etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total`). Frequent elections point to disk, network, or resource issues.
attributes.name: [etcd OTel] Frequent leader elections

investigation_guide.blob:
## etcd frequent leader elections

### What fired
Counter `etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total` incremented more than once in 15 minutes.

### Why it matters
Leader elections pause all writes and rebuild Raft state. Frequent elections degrade throughput and indicate instability in the cluster.

### Triage
1. Correlate with heartbeat failures and slow applies.
2. Inspect disk fsync latency on all peers.
3. Check for network partitions or peer restarts.

### Remediation
- Stabilise disk I/O.
- Keep peers in the same failure domain for low latency.

### Tuning
- `> 1 change per 15m` is the documented threshold. Lower for latency-sensitive tiers.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-default*
// Counter: leader changes observed; frequent elections suggest disk I/O, network, or resource issues
| WHERE etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = SUM(INCREASE(etcd_server_leader_changes_seen_total))
    BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id
// Alert when more than 1 leader change in window; adjust threshold for sensitivity
| WHERE changes > 1
| SORT changes DESC
